abstracts.abstract: To enact sections 3313.7118, 3313.7119, 3314.148, 3326.62, and 3328.40 of the Revised Code regarding school policies on the administration of overdose reversal drugs.

bill.title: Regards school policies on administering overdose reversal drugs
